chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Appeal No. S- 65 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2016 For Orders on MA 8584/15 Mr. Mazhar Ali Leghari, Advocate for Applicant Syed Meeral Shah, D.P.G. By means of this application, the applicant is seeking return of R&Ps to the trial court so that he may be able to get back the surety papers, which had deposited on behalf of accused in S.C. No. 10-A of 1998. Since the applicant has been convicted and has filed an appeal before this court, the R&Ps have been called from the trial court for preparing the paper book. Learned DPG available in court in some other cases, waives notices of this application and record his no objection. In the circumstances let R&Ps of S.C. No. S.C. 10-A of 1998 be returned back to the trial court for a period of 10 days during which period the applicant may apply for return of surety papers and after 10 days the trial court shall resubmit the R&Ps before this court. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
